title: mulos #3458
definition:
1) a mill stone
    1a) a large mill consisted of two stones, an upper and an under one
    1b) the "nether" stone was stationary, but the upper one was turned
        by an ass
 2) a mill, the noise made by a mill
nasbUsage:
